name: Tangle App: connect wallet
goal: Connect the MetaMask or injected wallet to the Tangle App. Verify the wallet address is displayed in the UI.

name: Tangle App: staking flow
goal: Connect wallet, navigate to the staking section, select a validator or staking option, enter a small amount, and reach the staking confirmation dialog. Do NOT confirm the final transaction.

name: Tangle App: bridge flow
goal: Connect wallet, navigate to the bridge section, select a source and destination chain, enter a small amount, and reach the bridge review. Do NOT confirm.
